payload.answer: Committed durable architecture notes and preserved the two items explicitly marked as open questions.
citations: Brain DB should be the source of truth
Cognee should be a rebuildable semantic projection
Slack should be a strict memory intake agent

entity_resolution.reason: The input describes architectural decisions and open questions without requiring entity merge or disambiguation.

memory_cards.statement: Brain DB should be the source of truth in the Brain architecture.
Cognee should be a rebuildable semantic projection of Brain DB, not the source of truth.
Slack should be a strict memory intake agent in the Brain architecture.
It is unresolved whether Telegram should be added later to the Brain architecture.
It is unresolved which model is cheapest while saturating performance for the Brain system.

details: Committed Brain DB as source of truth.
Committed Cognee as rebuildable semantic projection.
Committed Slack as strict memory intake agent.
Recorded Telegram addition as an open question, not a decision.
Recorded model choice as an open question, not a decision.
